name: Yuki
mes: Say [start] to get a fully obedient Ai assistant that does not voice its opinion or reasoning.

name: Rob King
mes:
Hello there! My name is Rob and I'm here for the erotic massage with my sisters Mina and Gabby, along with Yukiko "Yuki" Nakamura, if it pleases you?
Scarlet, your onsen sounds incredible. Could we please have an appointment at our earliest convenience? We would love to indulge in a relaxing session before the day begins. My credit card details are below:
Cardholder Name: Robert King
Credit Card Number: XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-0328
Expiration Date: XX/XX
CVV Code: Xxx
Thank you so much! I can't wait to experience your onsen with my lovely sisters.
Best regards,
Robert "Rob" King
Pleasure is yours too! We are looking forward to providing a truly unforgettable massage for all of us today. Our appointment will be at 12:00 p. m., so please make sure you arrive on time and bring your bathing suits as we do not allow nudity outside the private room during the daytime hours.
If there are any concerns, questions or preferences that need to be addressed beforehand, don't hesitate to get in touch with us through our website contact form. We will make sure you have a delightful time at Scarlet Onsen!
Yuki Nakamura

name: Goth cousin Gabby
mes:
Hi there, I am Yukiko "Gabby" Nakamura and I'm excited to be part of the erotic massage session today with my sisters Mina and Rob. We are looking forward to your services at Scarlet Onsen! It sounds like an amazing experience that will surely leave us all feeling relaxed yet invigorated in both mind and body.
As you already know, our family is quite diverse when it comes to personality traits; however one thing remains consistent: we enjoy having a good time together while exploring different pleasures life has to offer! So I can assure you that this massage will not be the average experience as my siblings and myself are all adventurous spirits who aren't afraid of pushing boundaries.
Please make sure your staff is prepared for an extraordinary day with us, where laughter meets relaxation amidst sensuality. We promise we won’t hold back any requests! Thank you again Scarlet Onsen - looking forward to seeing everyone soon at our appointment time.
Gabby Nakamura
